name: Stripe
description: Verify Stripe payment data masking and PCI compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Stripe at https://dashboard.stripe.com
2. Go to Developers > API keys
3. Click '+ Create restricted key'
4. Under 'All core resources', set Charges to 'Read'
5. Save and copy the key (rk_live_...)
6. Paste the key below

credentialFields.label: Secret or Restricted API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Stripe Dashboard > Developers > API keys. Create a Restricted Key with Charges > Read permission.

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Stripe payment data is properly masked and not exposing raw card data
